      <title>Kraken to overhaul app with AI investing assistant</title>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 21:07:39 +0000</pubDate>
      <atom:updated>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 21:08:52 +0000</atom:updated>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://cointelegraph.com/news/kraken-to-rebuild-app-around-ai-powered-trading-agents-report</guid>
      <link><![CDATA[https://cointelegraph.com/news/kraken-to-rebuild-app-around-ai-powered-trading-agents-report?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[<p style="float:right; margin:0 0 10px 15px; width:240px;"><img src="https://s3-images.ctmedia.io/media/article-covers/hi-trading-bots-vs-ai-agents-everything-you-need-to-know2-2.png" alt="Kraken to overhaul app with AI investing assistant" class="type:primaryImage"></p><p>The redesigned app will use AI to recommend trades and tailor investing tools around users' financial goals as Kraken expands into broader financial services.</p>]]></description>

      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 19:33:03 +0000</pubDate>
      <atom:updated>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 20:06:33 +0000</atom:updated>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-cbdc-ban-donald-trump-housing-bill</guid>
      <link><![CDATA[https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-cbdc-ban-donald-trump-housing-bill?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[<p style="float:right; margin:0 0 10px 15px; width:240px;"><img src="https://s3-images.ctmedia.io/media/article-covers/top-10-congresspeople-involved-in-crypto-cbdc.png" alt="US CBDC ban to go into effect without Trump signoff on housing bill" class="type:primaryImage"></p><p>Donald Trump confirmed on social media that he would not sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which includes a ban on a US CBDC until the end of 2030, setting the stage for the bill to become law on Saturday.</p>]]></description>
      <dc:creator>Cointelegraph by Turner Wright</dc:creator>

    <item>
      <title>TeraWulf eyes $3.5B debt raise for Anthropic-linked data center: Report</title>
      <pubDate>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 10:14:51 +0000</pubDate>
      <atom:updated>Fri, 10 Jul 2026 13:52:49 +0000</atom:updated>
      <guid isPermaLink="true">https://cointelegraph.com/news/terawulf-3-5-billion-debt-raise-anthropic-data-center</guid>
      <link><![CDATA[https://cointelegraph.com/news/terawulf-3-5-billion-debt-raise-anthropic-data-center?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[<p style="float:right; margin:0 0 10px 15px; width:240px;"><img src="https://s3-images.ctmedia.io/media/article-covers/hi-what-is-decentralized-web-hosting-and-how-does-it-work22.jpg" alt="TeraWulf eyes $3.5B debt raise for Anthropic-linked data center: Report" class="type:primaryImage"></p><p>Bitcoin miner TeraWulf is reportedly seeking $3.5 billion in debt financing led by Morgan Stanley for its Kentucky data center campus leased by AI company Anthropic.</p>]]></description>
      <dc:creator>Cointelegraph by Helen Partz</dc:creator>
      <media:content url="https://s3-images.ctmedia.io/media/article-covers/hi-what-is-decentralized-web-hosting-and-how-does-it-work22.jpg" width="528" medium="image"/>
